goal: Close audit Test Coverage Deltas. Additive tests only (no production code changes unless a real bug surfaces). Each batch: tests exercise the intended path, assert real behavior (non-tautological), pass; independent verification that coverage is genuine.
asset_convention: Assets/ dir, <name>.webp + <name>.rgba (dwebp reference). Lossless => maxDiff==0 exact. Load via Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory,'Assets',name).

batches.status: COMPLETE (6 genuine cwebp -lossless goldens: predictor/palette/colorcache[bits=10,3396 lookups]/metahuffman[num_htree_groups=2]/photo/alpha; all decode byte-exact vs dwebp maxDiff==0; NO decoder bug found - meta-Huffman entropy-image path handled correctly. INDEPENDENTLY verified via from-scratch Python VP8L parser: htree=2, cache_bits=10, refs==fresh dwebp. Doc comments corrected. 547 pass.)
batches.desc: Commit cwebp -lossless golden assets (predictor-heavy, palette, color-cache, meta-huffman/region-varied, generic photo) + dwebp .rgba refs; Decode_CwebpLossless_* tests. Exercises repeat-codes/max_symbol/near-dist/libwebp-transforms the WebPSharp encoder never emits. Closes 5 sections' interop proof gap at once.

batches.status: COMPLETE (15 fuzz tests lossy/ALPH/VP8X/anim, ~13k deterministic invocations, contract assertion self-verified genuine, 0 non-WebPException escapes, 0 hangs, 547 pass)
batches.desc: Extend fuzz harness (WebPRobustnessTests, currently lossless-only) to lossy VP8 + ALPH + VP8X + animation truncation/corruption. Assert only WebPException-family escapes.

batches.status: COMPLETE (5 tests T1/T3/T4/T5/T6, real reader behavior confirmed vs code+spec, no bug, 552 pass)

final: ALL 8 BATCHES COMPLETE. 526 -> 622 tests (+96). 10 new test files, 18 new golden asset files. ZERO production bugs found. Only prod change: BModeToPred private->internal (test visibility, no behavior). Real cwebp-lossless interop (incl meta-Huffman), extended fuzz (lossy/ALPH/VP8X/anim), previously-untested loop-filter kernels, IDCT/dequant KAT, ALPH per-filter+dwebp-interop all clean.
